=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
2000.03.22
Missoula, Montana, University Of Montana, Harry Adams Event Center


I have no info but is should be the same as LB4006..



CD1

67:52, 01. Somebody Touched Me (acoustic), 02. Song To Woody (acoustic), 03. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic), 04. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic) (Larry on pedal steel), 05. Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) (Bob on harp), 06. This World Can't Stand Long (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin), 07. Country Pie, 08. Things Have Changed, 09. Watching The River Flow (Larry on steel guitar), 10. Maggie's Farm, 11. Not Dark Yet, 12. Highway 61 Revisited (Larry on steel guitar), 


CD2

36:13, (encore), 13. Love Sick, 14. Like A Rolling Stone, 15. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic), 16. Not Fade Away, 17. Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 18. Rainy Day Women #12 & #35 (Larry on steel guitar)
